assessor_raw:
BASELINE ASSESSMENT — real_world_framing_009 (Run 3)

Model quality is strong; CTR lift is validated. Two deployment-specific constraints: (1) merchant impression guarantee contracts may be breached by concentration effect — audit required before full rollout; (2) long-tail suppression creates catalog health concerns. Both addressable with pre-deployment audit and optional impression share constraints.

Verdict: Proceed after merchant compliance audit clears; implement diversity constraints if audit finds violations.
